scripts.electron:build:win:local: node scripts/set-config.js local && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:win:remote: node scripts/set-config.js remote && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:win:portable: node scripts/set-config.js local && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config.win.target=portable
scripts.electron:build:mac:local: node scripts/set-config.js local && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config.mac.target=zip
scripts.electron:build:mac:remote: node scripts/set-config.js remote && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config.mac.target=zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.electron:build:mac:dmg: node scripts/set-config.js local && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config.mac.target=dmg
scripts.electron:build:mac:zip: node scripts/set-config.js local && npx cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --config.mac.target=zip
